code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn byte_at_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int, _ d: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    d
  end
end

fn transform(_ word: String) -> String
  let n = string.len(word)
  if n == 0
    word
  else
    let first_byte = byte_at_or(word, 0, 0)
    if first_byte >= 97 and first_byte <= 122
      let upper = first_byte - 32
      let rest = string.substring(word, 1, n)
      "#{string.from_byte(upper)}#{rest}"
    else
      word
    end
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut first = true
mut start = 0
mut in_word = false
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    byte_at_or(line, i, 32)
  else
    32
  end
  if is_ws(b)
    if in_word
      let word = string.substring(line, start, i)
      let processed = transform(word)
      if first
        result = processed
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{processed}"
      end
      in_word = false
    end
  else
    if not in_word
      start = i
      in_word = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
